name: button-group-size
visual_summary: A button group of varying sizes can be used in a wide array of contexts, such as navigation menus, action bars, or as a form of content aggregation. This component is ideal for developers who require a versatile button group that can be customized based on size and arrangement. Utilize this component to add a touch of sophistication and functionality to any interface.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-group-size
Description: A button group of varying sizes can be used in a wide array of contexts, such as navigation menus, action bars, or as a form of content aggregation. This component is ideal for developers who require a versatile button group that can be customized based on size and arrangement. Utilize this component to add a touch of sophistication and functionality to any interface.
Style: flat, minimal, responsive
Interactions: onClick
Tags: button, group, size, configuration, customizable, interface, navigation, forms

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
